name: 7 Layer Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
2. Sprinkle the graham cracker crumbs evenly over the melted butter.
3. Sprinkle chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, and chopped walnuts on top of the crumbs in layers.
4. Sprinkle flaked coconut over the walnut layer.
5. Pour the sweetened condensed milk over the coconut layer.
6. Place the pan in a pre-heated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting into desired sizes.
